summary_english: Arjuna surveys the battlefield of Kurukshetra and, seeing his relatives arrayed against him, is overcome with grief and despondency, refusing to fight.
summary_hindi: अर्जुन कुरुक्षेत्र के युद्धक्षेत्र में अपने परिजनों को देखकर विषाद में डूब जाते हैं और युद्ध करने से इनकार कर देते हैं।
key_themes: grief, doubt, moral dilemma, attachment, duty conflict
modern_mapping: anxiety, fear of failure, paralysis, family conflict

summary_english: Krishna begins his teaching, explaining the immortality of the soul, the nature of duty, and the concept of Nishkama Karma — action without attachment to results.
summary_hindi: कृष्ण आत्मा की अमरता, कर्तव्य के स्वरूप और निष्काम कर्म की अवधारणा को समझाते हैं।
key_themes: soul immortality, duty, nishkama karma, sthitaprajna, equanimity
modern_mapping: career anxiety, fear of death, overthinking, performance pressure

summary_english: Krishna explains that action is superior to inaction. Everyone must work; the wise do so without attachment, as a yajna (sacrifice) for the benefit of all.
summary_hindi: कृष्ण समझाते हैं कि कर्म अकर्म से श्रेष्ठ है। सभी को कार्य करना चाहिए, परंतु फल की आसक्ति के बिना।
key_themes: selfless action, yajna, duty without attachment, renunciation of fruit

name_english: The Yoga of Knowledge and Renunciation of Action
summary_english: Krishna reveals the ancient lineage of this wisdom, explains the nature of divine incarnations, and describes how knowledge burns all karmas.
summary_hindi: कृष्ण इस ज्ञान की दिव्य परंपरा का रहस्य बताते हैं और बताते हैं कि ज्ञान सभी कर्मों को भस्म कर देता है।
key_themes: divine incarnation, transmigration, fire of knowledge, wise action
modern_mapping: purpose, spiritual awakening, existential crisis, seeking a teacher/guru

name_english: The Yoga of Renunciation of Action
summary_english: Krishna reconciles karma yoga and jnana yoga, showing that true renunciation is internal — acting in the world without ego or desire.
summary_hindi: कृष्ण कर्म योग और ज्ञान योग में सामंजस्य बताते हैं — सच्चा संन्यास आंतरिक है, अहंकार और इच्छा रहित कर्म।
key_themes: inner renunciation, equanimity, brahman, liberation through action
modern_mapping: ego issues, emotional detachment, inner peace, mindfulness

summary_english: Krishna teaches practical techniques of meditation, the qualities of a true yogi, and how to restrain the restless mind.
summary_hindi: कृष्ण ध्यान की व्यावहारिक विधियाँ, एक सच्चे योगी के गुण और चंचल मन को नियंत्रित करने के तरीके सिखाते हैं।
key_themes: meditation, mind control, yogi, moderation, dhyana
modern_mapping: anxiety, insomnia, overthinking, mental health, meditation practice

name_english: The Yoga of Knowledge and Wisdom
summary_english: Krishna explains his divine nature, the two aspects of his energy (para and apara prakriti), and why few truly know him.
summary_hindi: कृष्ण अपनी दिव्य प्रकृति और अपनी दोनों शक्तियों — परा और अपरा प्रकृति — का वर्णन करते हैं।
key_themes: divine nature, maya, devotees, knowledge vs wisdom, God's energy
modern_mapping: spiritual confusion, seeking God, faith, materialism vs spirituality

name_english: The Yoga of the Imperishable Brahman
summary_english: Krishna explains Brahman, Atman, karma, and the process of dying — how the last thought at death determines the next birth.
summary_hindi: कृष्ण ब्रह्म, आत्मा, कर्म और मृत्यु के समय की मनोस्थिति का वर्णन करते हैं जो अगले जन्म को निर्धारित करती है।
key_themes: brahman, death and rebirth, last thought, liberation, eternal
modern_mapping: fear of death, afterlife beliefs, legacy, preparing for the end

name_english: The Yoga of Royal Knowledge and Royal Secret
summary_english: Krishna reveals the most secret knowledge: he pervades all creation, yet remains beyond it. Devotion offered with love reaches him regardless of the devotee's status.
summary_hindi: कृष्ण सबसे गुप्त ज्ञान प्रकट करते हैं: वे सर्वत्र व्याप्त हैं, फिर भी परे हैं। प्रेम से अर्पित भक्ति उन्हें मिलती है।
key_themes: omnipresence, devotion, bhakti, equality, divine love
modern_mapping: feeling unworthy, inclusivity, finding God everywhere, love and devotion

summary_english: Krishna describes his divine manifestations — the vibhutis — explaining that wherever there is excellence, beauty, or power in the world, it is a spark of his glory.
summary_hindi: कृष्ण अपनी दिव्य विभूतियों का वर्णन करते हैं — जहाँ भी श्रेष्ठता, सौंदर्य या शक्ति है, वह उनकी महिमा का अंश है।
key_themes: divine manifestations, excellence, glory, creator, omnipotence
modern_mapping: finding the divine in daily life, awe, creativity, talent

name_english: The Yoga of the Vision of the Cosmic Form
summary_english: Arjuna, granted divine vision, witnesses Krishna's infinite cosmic form — the Vishvarupa — containing all of creation, and is awestruck and humbled.
summary_hindi: अर्जुन को दिव्य दृष्टि मिलती है और वे कृष्ण के विश्वरूप का साक्षात्कार करते हैं जिसमें संपूर्ण सृष्टि समाहित है।
key_themes: cosmic form, divine vision, awe, surrender, time and destruction
modern_mapping: encountering something larger than yourself, humility, overwhelm, awe

summary_english: Krishna declares bhakti (devotion) as the highest and most accessible path, and describes the qualities of his dearest devotee.
summary_hindi: कृष्ण भक्ति को सर्वोच्च और सबसे सुलभ मार्ग बताते हैं और अपने प्रिय भक्त के गुणों का वर्णन करते हैं।
key_themes: devotion, love, qualities of a devotee, accessible spirituality
modern_mapping: religious doubt, how to pray, love for God, spiritual practice

name_english: The Yoga of the Field and Its Knower
summary_english: Krishna distinguishes between the body (kshetra, the field) and the soul (kshetrajna, the knower), and explains the qualities of true knowledge.
summary_hindi: कृष्ण शरीर (क्षेत्र) और आत्मा (क्षेत्रज्ञ) के बीच भेद करते हैं और सच्चे ज्ञान के गुणों का वर्णन करते हैं।
key_themes: body vs soul, self-knowledge, humility, wisdom
modern_mapping: identity crisis, who am I, body image, self-understanding

name_english: The Yoga of the Division of Three Gunas
summary_english: Krishna explains the three gunas — sattva (clarity), rajas (passion), and tamas (inertia) — that bind the soul to the body and the world.
summary_hindi: कृष्ण तीन गुणों — सत्त्व, रजस और तमस — का वर्णन करते हैं जो आत्मा को देह और संसार से बाँधते हैं।
key_themes: three gunas, sattva, rajas, tamas, transcendence
modern_mapping: personality types, laziness, overactivity, achieving clarity

name_english: The Yoga of the Supreme Person
summary_english: Krishna describes the cosmic Ashvattha tree (symbol of material existence), the supreme soul, and declares himself Purushottama — beyond both perishable and imperishable.
summary_hindi: कृष्ण संसार रूपी अश्वत्थ वृक्ष और परम आत्मा का वर्णन करते हैं और स्वयं को पुरुषोत्तम घोषित करते हैं।
key_themes: material world, supreme soul, purushottama, liberation
modern_mapping: materialism trap, spiritual liberation, higher purpose

name_english: The Yoga of the Division of Divine and Demonic Qualities
summary_english: Krishna lists the divine qualities that lead to liberation and the demonic qualities that lead to bondage, urging Arjuna to follow scripture.
summary_hindi: कृष्ण दैवीय गुणों की सूची देते हैं जो मुक्ति की ओर ले जाते हैं और आसुरी गुणों की जो बंधन की ओर।
key_themes: virtue, vice, divine qualities, demonic tendencies, dharma
modern_mapping: moral character, toxic behavior, ethics, good vs evil choices

name_english: The Yoga of the Division of Threefold Faith
summary_english: Krishna classifies faith, food, sacrifice, austerity, and charity according to the three gunas — showing how one's inner nature shapes all outer actions.
summary_hindi: कृष्ण श्रद्धा, भोजन, यज्ञ, तप और दान को तीन गुणों के अनुसार वर्गीकृत करते हैं।
key_themes: faith, food, worship, austerity, charity, gunas in daily life
modern_mapping: lifestyle choices, diet, habits, giving, spiritual discipline

name_english: The Yoga of Liberation and Renunciation
summary_english: The grand conclusion: Krishna summarizes all teachings — duty, knowledge, devotion, renunciation. He urges Arjuna to surrender completely to him, promising liberation.
summary_hindi: महान उपसंहार: कृष्ण सभी शिक्षाओं का सार देते हैं — कर्तव्य, ज्ञान, भक्ति, संन्यास।
key_themes: renunciation, liberation, surrender, final teaching, moksha
modern_mapping: life summary, legacy, final decisions, letting go, complete surrender
